english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Qalam – The Pen

Nun. By the Pen and what they write:
Al Qalam – The Pen

by your Lord’s blessing, you are not, crazy,
Al Qalam – The Pen

and yours indeed will be an everlasting reward,
Al Qalam – The Pen

and indeed you possess a great character.
Al Qalam – The Pen

You will see and they will see,
Al Qalam – The Pen

which one of you is crazy.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِالْمُهْتَدِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord knows best those who stray from His way, and He knows best those who are guided.
Al Qalam – The Pen

So do not obey the deniers,
Al Qalam – The Pen

who are eager that you should be flexible, so that they [too] may be flexible [towards you].
Al Qalam – The Pen

And do not obey any vile swearer,
Al Qalam – The Pen

scandal-monger, talebearer,
Al Qalam – The Pen

hinderer of all good, sinful transgressor,
Al Qalam – The Pen

callous and, on top of that, baseborn
Al Qalam – The Pen

—[who behaves in such a manner only] because he has wealth and children.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ آيَاتُنَا قَالَ أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
When Our signs are recited to him, he says, ‘Myths of the ancients!’
Al Qalam – The Pen

Soon We shall brand him on his snout.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَاهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَا أَصْحَابَ الْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed we have tested them just as We tested the People of the Garden when they vowed they would gather its fruit at dawn,
Al Qalam – The Pen

and they did not make any exception.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَائِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَائِمُونَ
english translation text:
Then, a visitation from your Lord visited it while they were asleep.
Al Qalam – The Pen

So, by dawn it was like a harvested field.
Al Qalam – The Pen

At dawn they called out to one another,
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: أَنِ اغْدُوا عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَارِمِينَ
english translation text:
‘Get off early to your field if you have to gather [the fruits].’
Al Qalam – The Pen

So off they went, murmuring to one another:
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا الْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
english translation text:
‘Today no needy man shall come to you in it.’
Al Qalam – The Pen

And they set out at early morning, [considering themselves] able to deprive [the poor of its fruit].
Al Qalam – The Pen

But when they saw it, they said, ‘We have indeed lost our way!’
Al Qalam – The Pen

‘No, it is we who have been deprived!’
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
english translation text:
The most upright among them said, ‘Did I not tell you, ‘‘Why do you not glorify [Allah]?’’ ’
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: قَالُوا سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَالِمِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Immaculate is our Lord! We have indeed been wrongdoers!’
Al Qalam – The Pen

Then they turned to one another, blaming each other.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: قَالُوا يَا وَيْلَنَا إِنَّا كُنَّا طَاغِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Woe to us! Indeed, we have been rebellious.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَا أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَا إِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَاغِبُونَ
english translation text:
Maybe our Lord will give us a better one in its place. Indeed we earnestly beseech our Lord.’
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ الْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ الْآخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Such was their punishment; and the punishment of the Hereafter is surely greater, had they known.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتِ النَّعِيمِ
english translation text:
Indeed for the Godwary there will be gardens of bliss near their Lord.
Al Qalam – The Pen

Shall We treat those who submit [to Us] as [We treat] the guilty?
Al Qalam – The Pen

What is the matter with you? How do you judge!
Al Qalam – The Pen

Do you possess a scripture in which you read
Al Qalam – The Pen

that you shall have in it whatever you choose?
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانٌ عَلَيْنَا بَالِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
english translation text:
Do you have a pledge binding on Us until the Day of Resurrection, that you shall indeed have whatever you decide?
Al Qalam – The Pen

Ask them, which of them will aver [any of] that!
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَاءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا بِشُرَكَائِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا صَادِقِينَ
english translation text:
Do they have any ‘partners’ [that they claim for Allah]? Then let them produce their partners, if they are truthful.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
english translation text:
The day when the catastrophe occurs and they are summoned to prostrate themselves, they will not be able [to do it].
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَالِمُونَ
english translation text:
With a humbled look [in their eyes], they will be overcast by abasement. Certainly, they were summoned to prostrate themselves while they were yet sound.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: فَذَرْنِي وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا الْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
So leave Me with those who deny this discourse. We will draw them imperceptibly [into ruin], whence they do not know.
Al Qalam – The Pen

I will grant them respite, for My devising is indeed sure.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
english translation text:
Do you ask them for a reward, so that they are weighed down with debt?
Al Qalam – The Pen

Do they possess [access to] the Unseen, so that they write it down?
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: فَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ الْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
english translation text:
So submit patiently to the judgement of your Lord, and do not be like the Man of the Fish who called out as he choked with grief.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: لَّوْلَا أَن تَدَارَكَهُ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِ لَنُبِذَ بِالْعَرَاءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
english translation text:
Had it not been for a blessing that came to his rescue from his Lord, he would surely have been cast on the bare shore, being blameworthy.
Al Qalam – The Pen

So his Lord chose him and made him one of the righteous.
Al Qalam – The Pen

arabic text: وَإِن يَكَادُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَارِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا الذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُ لَمَجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
Indeed the faithless almost devour you with their eyes when they hear this Reminder, and they say, ‘He is indeed crazy.’
Al Qalam – The Pen

Yet it is just a reminder for all the nations.
Al Qalam – The Pen
